code:
let matrix = [[1, 2, 3], [4, 5, 6], [7, 8, 9]]
mut total = 0
mut i = 0
while i < matrix.len()
  let row = match matrix.get(i)
  when Some(r)
    r
  when None
    [0, 0, 0]
  end
  mut j = 0
  while j < row.len()
    let v = match row.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    total = total + v
    j = j + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("total=#{total}")
